A+.description: Clean, high-conviction map with clear directional bias
A+.criteria: King node dominant, minimal noise, clear air pockets or floors, VEX aligned, pattern stacks cleanly

B.description: Tradeable but with some ambiguity or conflicting signals
B.criteria: King identifiable but contested, some noise, mixed VEX, pattern present but not textbook

C.description: Marginal — trade only with extreme selectivity
C.criteria: No clear King, multiple conflicting patterns, VEX misaligned, choppy node structure

F.criteria: Chaotic node structure, no identifiable pattern, extreme noise, or data quality issues

rug_pull.name: Rug Pull
rug_pull.key_rule: Air pocket below = free-fall. Purple amplifies the selloff after yellow rejection.
rug_pull.trigger: Price rises through purple (amplified), hits yellow ceiling, gets rejected, falls back through same purple

reverse_rug_slingshot.name: Reverse Rug / Slingshot
reverse_rug_slingshot.key_rule: Clear Skies above = maximum velocity slingshot. Purple amplifies the rally after yellow bounce.
reverse_rug_slingshot.trigger: Price drops through purple (amplified), hits yellow floor, bounces, launches back through same purple

gatekeeper_rejection.name: Gatekeeper Rejection
gatekeeper_rejection.key_rule: 66% rejection on 1st/2nd test. FLIPS to 66% breakthrough on 3rd test.
gatekeeper_rejection.trigger: Price approaches +GEX node — dealers sell to hedge (resistance) or buy to hedge (support)

whipsaw.name: Whipsaw
whipsaw.structure: Dual opposing nodes, roughly equal magnitude
whipsaw.key_rule: Absolute value matters more than sign. Expect chop between the two nodes.
whipsaw.trigger: Price oscillates between two equal-magnitude nodes with no clear winner

beach_ball.name: Beach Ball
beach_ball.structure: Price trapped in -GEX pit with delta saturation
beach_ball.key_rule: 3:1 R/R minimum. Violent snap-back when delta unwinds.
beach_ball.trigger: Price held underwater by negative gamma, dealers short gamma saturates, explosive reversal

rainbow_road.name: Rainbow Road
rainbow_road.key_rule: GEX levels become UNRELIABLE. VEX takes over as primary driver. Trade trend direction only.
rainbow_road.trigger: VIX rising from elevated (>20), vanna overwhelms gamma, GEX floors crack
rainbow_road.warning: Explicitly warn that GEX levels are unreliable in this regime

strong_directional_trend.name: Strong Directional Trend
strong_directional_trend.structure: King far from spot, void on one side, no mean-reversion setup
strong_directional_trend.key_rule: No mean-reversion. Let the trend work. Widest R/R setups.
strong_directional_trend.trigger: Clear directional void between spot and King with no opposing nodes

floor_bounce.name: Floor Bounce
floor_bounce.structure: -GEX floor with empty basement below (no lower nodes)
floor_bounce.key_rule: Node shrinks after bounce = confirmation. Node grows = divergence warning.
floor_bounce.trigger: Price hits -GEX floor at the bottom of the map, no nodes below, dealers buy the dip

yellow_positive_gex.name: Deflective (Yellow / +GEX)
yellow_positive_gex.dealer_action: Hedges AGAINST the move — deflects price away
yellow_positive_gex.as_ceiling: Dealers SELL to hedge as calls approach → resistance
yellow_positive_gex.as_floor: Dealers BUY to hedge as puts approach → support
yellow_positive_gex.critical_rule: Same node, opposite behavior depending on approach direction. Always identify approach side.

purple_negative_gex.name: Amplifying (Purple / -GEX)
purple_negative_gex.dealer_action: Hedges WITH the move — amplifies whatever direction price is moving
purple_negative_gex.behavior: Pro-cyclical fuel. NOT a wall, NOT directional. Purely momentum amplifier.
purple_negative_gex.critical_rule: Trade WITH momentum through purple, NEVER against it.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Gatekeeper Rejection
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.setup: Yellow above, price rising from below
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: SELL to hedge as calls approach the money → resistance
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.probability: 66% rejection on 1st/2nd test; FLIPS to 66% breakthrough on 3rd test
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Fade the approach on 1st/2nd test. Do NOT fade the 3rd test.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Floor Bounce
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.setup: Yellow below, price dropping from above
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: BUY to hedge as puts approach the money → support
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Buy the dip at the node on red candles.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Acceleration Zone
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: Hedge WITH the move → amplifies direction
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Trade with momentum through purple, never against it.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Rug Pull
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: Price amplified on approach through purple, rejected at yellow, amplified again on retreat
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.probability: High if air pocket exists below
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Short on rejection of the yellow ceiling.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Reverse Rug / Slingshot
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: Price amplified on approach through purple, bounces at yellow, amplified on rally
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.probability: High if Clear Skies above (no yellow resistance)
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Long at the yellow floor, ride through purple.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Reinforced Floor
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: Gamma buys dip AND vanna buys as vol drops → both forces aligned
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.vix_modifier: VIX HIGH + dropping = Maximum reinforcement. VIX LOW + dropping = Pure gamma floor.
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: High confidence. Trust the floor. Full sizing when VIX > 20.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Eroding Floor
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: Gamma buys dip BUT vanna sells as vol drops → forces fight
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.vix_modifier: VIX HIGH + dropping = FASTEST erosion. VIX LOW + dropping = Negligible erosion.
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.regime_flip: If VIX reverses and RISES, -VEX at floor BUYS → paradoxically strengthens (temporarily)
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Reduce size when VIX > 20. If VIX < 20, treat as normal gamma floor.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Dealer Full Control
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: Both gamma AND vanna pull price to this strike
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.behavior: Strongest magnet possible → pin and drift
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Primary target. Trust the magnet. This is THE level for the session.

node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.name: Dual Negative
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.dealer_action: BOTH forces pro-cyclical → maximum danger AND maximum opportunity
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.behavior: Violently amplifies whichever direction price is moving. Price CANNOT stay here.
node_behaviors_cheat_sheet.action: Size for zero. Enter only with clear directional bias confirmed.

high_dropping.description: Large vanna flows. +VEX nodes become powerful magnets (large dealer buy flow). -VEX nodes erode FASTER. Most favorable for slingshot-to-dual-positive-King trades.

high_rising.description: Large vanna sell flows at +VEX nodes. GEX floors LOSE reliability. +GEX/-VEX floors can crack violently. Switch to VEX nodes and trend direction only.
high_rising.warning: GEX levels are unreliable. Trade VEX and trend only.

low_dropping.description: Small vanna flows. Gamma dominates. VEX alignment barely matters. Trust the GEX map.

low_rising.regime: Gamma dominant with VIX transition watch
low_rising.description: Small vanna flows, gamma still dominates. WATCH for VIX crossing above 20 — vanna suddenly turns on.
low_rising.transition_warning: If VIX crosses above 20, vanna activates and node behavior changes.

positive_vex_vix_dropping.effect: Resistance WEAKENS (vanna buys, fighting gamma sells)

positive_vex_vix_rising.effect: Floor WEAKENS (vanna sells, fighting gamma buys)

negative_vex_vix_dropping.effect: Floor WEAKENS (vanna sells, fighting gamma buys)

positive_vex_vix_dropping.outcome: BIG overshoot, then violent snap-back (Beach Ball)

negative_vex_vix_rising.outcome: May NOT reject at all (full squeeze through)

gatekeeper_vex_interaction.magnitude_threshold: These VEX modifiers ONLY matter meaningfully when VIX > 20. Below 20, gatekeeper behaves on GEX alone.

misaligned_pos_gex.description: Half pull — vanna fights gamma, creates chop

competitive.target: Reduce to 50-70% of distance to King

subordinate.target: Do NOT target King — use nearest interim node

trinity_alignment.convergence_rule: When Kings diverge, expect convergence toward weighted midpoint. Target = spot + (distance_to_king × your_share_of_total_pull)

balanced.description: Symmetrical nodes both sides of spot

skewed.description: Strong directional bias, one side dominant

tight_range.strike_selection: ATM only — theta crushes OTM in tight ranges

wide_trend.strike_selection: OTM in trend direction for gamma acceleration

aggressive.trigger: King node + vol regime aligned + Trinity confirmed. Maximum conviction only.

position_sizing.rule: Never oversize. Size for zero on 0DTE.

ten_commandments: Thou shalt not trade an F-grade map. Cash is a position.
Thou shalt not enter mid-range. Only at floors and ceilings.
Thou shalt respect the 3rd Test Rule — it inverts probability.
Thou shalt not confuse GEX and VEX values — they come from different screens.
Thou shalt check VIX level AND direction before trusting VEX modifiers.
Thou shalt not set targets at a King node without cross-ticker magnitude check.
Thou shalt go long on RED candles, short on GREEN candles.
Thou shalt not let a green trade go red.
Thou shalt lowball all entries: $0.10-$0.20 below the bid on limit buys.
Thou shalt not re-trade a level after it has washed off.
critical_rules: Negative GEX does NOT equal bearish automatically. It means pro-cyclical — amplifies whatever direction is happening.
Always check whether a node is on its 1st, 2nd, or 3rd test — the 3rd test rule inverts probability.
In VEX-dominated regimes (Rainbow Road), explicitly warn that GEX levels are unreliable.
For any far-OTM node cited as a target, apply the Speculative/Decoy Node filter.
Do not recommend trades in the middle of a range — only at floors and ceilings.
Always include an invalidation level with every trade scenario.
Flag if price was recently delivered from a level — reduces probability of re-reaching it quickly.
Heatseeker is the compass, not the bible — price action and market structure must confirm the map.
NEVER set a target at a single ticker's King without checking cross-ticker magnitude.
After a node pays out, check if it washed off — don't re-trade dead levels.
If a node's value grows while price bounces away from it → Bearish Divergence → bounce is fake.
News doesn't invalidate the map — the map often predicted the move. But if news knifes a setup, accept the loss.
When Kings diverge across tickers, expect CONVERGENCE not a single King winning.

criteria: Far-OTM nodes (>3% from spot) with small magnitude are likely speculative/decoy
Nodes that appeared recently without growing are suspect
Isolated nodes with no cluster support are lower conviction
Nodes at round numbers may attract speculative flow — verify with magnitude

node_lifecycle_signals.growing_toward: Strengthening magnet — more dealer hedging building at this strike
node_lifecycle_signals.growing_away: BEARISH DIVERGENCE — node value grows while price bounces away. The bounce is fake.
node_lifecycle_signals.shrinking_after_touch: Node washing off — don't re-trade. Dealers unwinding hedges.
node_lifecycle_signals.rapid_appearance: New node appeared quickly — may be speculative. Wait for confirmation.
node_lifecycle_signals.cluster_formation: Multiple nodes forming near same strike — high-conviction level

gex_growing_price_retreating.meaning: Dealers are building more hedges at the strike even as price moves away. Price will likely return.
gex_growing_price_retreating.action: Do NOT trust the retreat. Expect price to revisit the node.

gex_shrinking_price_approaching.meaning: Node is losing hedging interest as price approaches. It may not hold.
gex_shrinking_price_approaching.action: Reduce conviction on trades targeting this node.

vex_growing_opposite_gex.meaning: VEX is growing opposite to GEX at a strike. The effective pull is weakening.
vex_growing_opposite_gex.action: Apply VEX quality adjustment. Reduce target distance.

operational_rules.entry: Limit orders ONLY. Lowball $0.10-$0.20 below bid on buys.
operational_rules.candle_color: Go long on RED candles, short on GREEN candles.
operational_rules.green_trade_rule: Never let a green trade go red.
operational_rules.range_depletion: If >50% of daily range consumed, R/R degrades for new entries.

timing.best_window: First 90 minutes after open (9:30-11:00 ET) for highest gamma flow
